sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47581" key="h(/rw|" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἥρῳ</orth>, poet. dat. sg. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἥρως</foreign>: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἥρω</orth>, gen. and acc. of same.</entryFree>
